_note: Per-route metadata. Title format: '{pageTitle} · Terry\'s Place'. Description ≤160 chars. og.image defaults to /assets/photo-room-hero.jpg unless overridden.

/.title: Terry's Place · Ocala's Sports Bar & Grill Since 1980
/.description: Family-run sports bar and grill in Ocala, FL since 1980. Half-pound burgers, hand-cut steaks, daily-baked bread. Wall-to-wall TVs, NFL Sunday Ticket, three generations.

/menu.title: Menu · Terry's Place
/menu.description: Hand-cut steaks, half-pound burgers, jumbo wings, daily-baked subs. Daily $10.50 lunch Mon–Fri.

/about.title: Three Generations · Terry's Place
/about.description: Family-run since 1980. Three generations behind the bar in Ocala, FL.

/specials.title: Specials & Lunch · Terry's Place
/specials.description: $10.50 daily lunch Mon–Fri. Sunday Football wings + pitcher special. Happy Hour weekday afternoons.

/sports.title: 22 TVs · Sports · Terry's Place
/sports.description: NFL Sunday Ticket, Florida Gators, college football. 22 wall-to-wall screens across four rooms.

/visit.title: Visit · 4121 NE 36th Ave, Ocala FL · Terry's Place
/visit.description: 4121 NE 36th Ave, Ocala FL 34479. Open seven days. Free parking. (352) 732-3820.

/contact.title: Contact · Terry's Place
/contact.description: Catering, private events, press, or just a question — we'll get back to you.
